hypothesis: If the integrated thermodynamics–cellular automaton–machine learning workflow is used to rank commercially accessible recipes for Ca2SiO4 within 800–1600°C, then the top-ranked routes will produce Ca2SiO4 more reliably and at lower reagent cost than alternative routes because the combined energetic descriptors, probabilistic reaction-network simulations, and market data correctly identify the most likely and economically efficient synthesis pathways.
